/usr/bin/cc    CMakeFiles/leader.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/leader.dir/src/sys_commu_ipc.c.o CMakeFiles/leader.dir/src/sys_db.c.o CMakeFiles/leader.dir/src/sys_leader.c.o CMakeFiles/leader.dir/src/sys_master.c.o CMakeFiles/leader.dir/src/sys_master_chassis.c.o CMakeFiles/leader.dir/src/sys_master_magic.c.o CMakeFiles/leader.dir/src/sys_master_serial.c.o CMakeFiles/leader.dir/src/sys_master_vision.c.o CMakeFiles/leader.dir/__/sys_share/sys_ctl.c.o CMakeFiles/leader.dir/__/sys_share/sys_globals.c.o CMakeFiles/leader.dir/__/sys_share/sys_share_daemon.c.o CMakeFiles/leader.dir/__/sys_share/sys_share_ipc.c.o  -o leader   -L/usr/local/ethercat/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/ethercat/lib -lpthread -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsqlite3.so /usr/local/ethercat/lib/libethercat.so
